{% extends "!layout.html" %} {# Append a persistent alpha / verify-the-physics notice to the bottom of the left navigation column, below the table of contents. The `navigation` block lives inside `.wy-side-scroll` (the sidebar), so the note scrolls with the TOC and stays in the nav column on every page. The theme's `versions.html` slot, by contrast, is rendered outside `.wy-nav-side` and is therefore the wrong place for this. #} {% block navigation %} {{ super() }}
⚠️ Alpha software. Descriptions of µSR data, fitting models, and workflows here may be incomplete or in error — verify the physics against trusted sources.
{% endblock %}
